_comment: PLACEHOLDER - Draft geometry. Replace with actual HUC-8 or HUC-10 watershed boundaries from USGS NHD for the Babbitt area.

properties.label: Embarrass River Sub-Watershed (Placeholder)
properties.outlet: Embarrass River → Vermilion River → Rainy River → Hudson Bay
properties.notes: The Embarrass River drains north from the Babbitt area, crossing the Laurentian Divide vicinity and joining the Vermilion River system. Drains to Hudson Bay. Placeholder - verify with USGS NHD.

properties.label: St. Louis River Headwaters Sub-Watershed (Placeholder)
properties.outlet: St. Louis River → Lake Superior → St. Lawrence Seaway
properties.notes: Southern drainage from Babbitt area enters the St. Louis River headwaters. This watershed drains to Lake Superior via Duluth. Any southern-draining groundwater contamination would affect this system. Placeholder - verify with USGS NHD.
